title: Initial proposal
desc: Create and submit initial project proposal to client

title: Quote
desc: Prepare detailed project quote and pricing breakdown

title: Contract
desc: Craft and sign project contract with client

title: Research & Moodboarding
desc: Conduct competitive analysis, collect inspiration and create moodboard

title: Wireframe
desc: Design low-fidelity wireframes for user flows and layouts

title: High-Fi Design
desc: Create high-fidelity designs and prototype in Figma

title: Feedback and iteration
desc: Collect client feedback and iterate on designs

title: Design system
desc: Collect client feedback and iterate on designs

title: Mockups
desc: Create final design mockups for all devices

title: Front-end development
desc: Implement in HTML, CSS, JavaScript / React.js

title: Browser compatibility check
desc: Test and ensure compatibility across major browsers

title: Code review and revision
desc: Collect client review and revise the code

title: Deploy
desc: Deploy to staging/preview environment for final review

title: Final Delivery
desc: Create ReadMe documentation and prepare final deliverables
